result.preview:
"Postgres query exectution error (ProgrammingError): (psycopg2.errors.UndefinedFunction) operator does not exist: text >= date
LINE 8:     AND createddate >= DATE '2022-04-01'
                            ^
HINT:  No operator matches the given name and argument types. You might need to add explicit type casts.

[SQL: WITH hist AS (
  SELECT
    TRIM(BOTH '#' FROM oldvalue__c) AS old_owner,
    TRIM(BOTH '#' FROM newvalue__c) AS new_owner,
    createddate
  FROM casehistory__c
  WHERE field__c ILIKE 'Owner%%'
    AND createddate >= DATE '2022-04-01'
    AND createddate <  DATE '2023-04-01'
), transfers AS (
  SELECT old_owner AS agent_id, COUNT(*) AS transfer_count
  FROM hist
  WHERE old_owner IS NOT NULL AND old_owner <> ''
    AND new_owner IS NOT NULL AND new_owner <> ''
    AND old_owner <> new_owner
  GROUP BY old_owner
), handled AS (
  SELECT agent_id, SUM(cnt) AS handled_cases
  FROM (
    SELECT TRIM(BOTH '#' FROM ownerid) AS agent_id, COUNT(*) AS cnt
    FROM "Case"
    WHERE createddate >= DATE '2022-04-01'
      AND createddate <  DATE '2023-04-01'
      AND ownerid IS NOT NULL AND TRIM(ownerid) <> ''
    GROUP BY TRIM(BOTH '#' FROM ownerid)
    UNION ALL
    SELECT TRIM(BOTH '#' FROM newvalue__c) AS agent_id, COUNT(DISTINCT caseid__c) AS cnt
    FROM casehistory__c
    WHERE field__c ILIKE 'Owner%%'
      AND createddate >= DATE '2022-04-01'
      AND createddate <  DATE '2023-04-01'
      AND newvalue__c IS NOT NULL AND TRIM(newvalue__c) <> ''
    GROUP BY TRIM(BOTH '#' FROM newvalue__c)
  ) x
  GROUP BY agent_id
)
SELECT h.agent_id AS "Id"
FROM handled h
LEFT JOIN transfers t ON t.agent_id = h.agent_id
WHERE h.handled_cases > 0
ORDER BY COALESCE(t.transfer_count,0) ASC, h.handled_cases DESC, h.agent_id ASC
LIMIT 1;]
(Background on this error at: https://sqlalche.me/e/20/f405)"

args.query:
WITH hist AS (
  SELECT
    TRIM(BOTH '#' FROM oldvalue__c) AS old_owner,
    TRIM(BOTH '#' FROM newvalue__c) AS new_owner,
    createddate
  FROM casehistory__c
  WHERE field__c ILIKE 'Owner%'
    AND createddate >= DATE '2022-04-01'
    AND createddate <  DATE '2023-04-01'
), transfers AS (
  SELECT old_owner AS agent_id, COUNT(*) AS transfer_count
  FROM hist
  WHERE old_owner IS NOT NULL AND old_owner <> ''
    AND new_owner IS NOT NULL AND new_owner <> ''
    AND old_owner <> new_owner
  GROUP BY old_owner
), handled AS (
  SELECT agent_id, SUM(cnt) AS handled_cases
  FROM (
    SELECT TRIM(BOTH '#' FROM ownerid) AS agent_id, COUNT(*) AS cnt
    FROM "Case"
    WHERE createddate >= DATE '2022-04-01'
      AND createddate <  DATE '2023-04-01'
      AND ownerid IS NOT NULL AND TRIM(ownerid) <> ''
    GROUP BY TRIM(BOTH '#' FROM ownerid)
    UNION ALL
    SELECT TRIM(BOTH '#' FROM newvalue__c) AS agent_id, COUNT(DISTINCT caseid__c) AS cnt
    FROM casehistory__c
    WHERE field__c ILIKE 'Owner%'
      AND createddate >= DATE '2022-04-01'
      AND createddate <  DATE '2023-04-01'
      AND newvalue__c IS NOT NULL AND TRIM(newvalue__c) <> ''
    GROUP BY TRIM(BOTH '#' FROM newvalue__c)
  ) x
  GROUP BY agent_id
)
SELECT h.agent_id AS "Id"
FROM handled h
LEFT JOIN transfers t ON t.agent_id = h.agent_id
WHERE h.handled_cases > 0
ORDER BY COALESCE(t.transfer_count,0) ASC, h.handled_cases DESC, h.agent_id ASC
LIMIT 1;

exec_args.sql:
WITH hist AS (
  SELECT
    TRIM(BOTH '#' FROM oldvalue__c) AS old_owner,
    TRIM(BOTH '#' FROM newvalue__c) AS new_owner,
    createddate
  FROM casehistory__c
  WHERE field__c ILIKE 'Owner%'
    AND createddate >= DATE '2022-04-01'
    AND createddate <  DATE '2023-04-01'
), transfers AS (
  SELECT old_owner AS agent_id, COUNT(*) AS transfer_count
  FROM hist
  WHERE old_owner IS NOT NULL AND old_owner <> ''
    AND new_owner IS NOT NULL AND new_owner <> ''
    AND old_owner <> new_owner
  GROUP BY old_owner
), handled AS (
  SELECT agent_id, SUM(cnt) AS handled_cases
  FROM (
    SELECT TRIM(BOTH '#' FROM ownerid) AS agent_id, COUNT(*) AS cnt
    FROM "Case"
    WHERE createddate >= DATE '2022-04-01'
      AND createddate <  DATE '2023-04-01'
      AND ownerid IS NOT NULL AND TRIM(ownerid) <> ''
    GROUP BY TRIM(BOTH '#' FROM ownerid)
    UNION ALL
    SELECT TRIM(BOTH '#' FROM newvalue__c) AS agent_id, COUNT(DISTINCT caseid__c) AS cnt
    FROM casehistory__c
    WHERE field__c ILIKE 'Owner%'
      AND createddate >= DATE '2022-04-01'
      AND createddate <  DATE '2023-04-01'
      AND newvalue__c IS NOT NULL AND TRIM(newvalue__c) <> ''
    GROUP BY TRIM(BOTH '#' FROM newvalue__c)
  ) x
  GROUP BY agent_id
)
SELECT h.agent_id AS "Id"
FROM handled h
LEFT JOIN transfers t ON t.agent_id = h.agent_id
WHERE h.handled_cases > 0
ORDER BY COALESCE(t.transfer_count,0) ASC, h.handled_cases DESC, h.agent_id ASC
LIMIT 1;

args.query:
WITH hist AS (
  SELECT
    TRIM(BOTH '#' FROM oldvalue__c) AS old_owner,
    TRIM(BOTH '#' FROM newvalue__c) AS new_owner,
    createddate::timestamp AS created_ts
  FROM casehistory__c
  WHERE field__c ILIKE 'Owner%'
    AND createddate::timestamp >= TIMESTAMP '2022-04-01'
    AND createddate::timestamp <  TIMESTAMP '2023-04-01'
), transfers AS (
  SELECT old_owner AS agent_id, COUNT(*) AS transfer_count
  FROM hist
  WHERE old_owner IS NOT NULL AND old_owner <> ''
    AND new_owner IS NOT NULL AND new_owner <> ''
    AND old_owner <> new_owner
  GROUP BY old_owner
), handled AS (
  SELECT agent_id, SUM(cnt) AS handled_cases
  FROM (
    SELECT TRIM(BOTH '#' FROM ownerid) AS agent_id, COUNT(*) AS cnt
    FROM "Case"
    WHERE createddate::timestamp >= TIMESTAMP '2022-04-01'
      AND createddate::timestamp <  TIMESTAMP '2023-04-01'
      AND ownerid IS NOT NULL AND TRIM(ownerid) <> ''
    GROUP BY TRIM(BOTH '#' FROM ownerid)
    UNION ALL
    SELECT TRIM(BOTH '#' FROM newvalue__c) AS agent_id, COUNT(DISTINCT TRIM(BOTH '#' FROM caseid__c)) AS cnt
    FROM casehistory__c
    WHERE field__c ILIKE 'Owner%'
      AND createddate::timestamp >= TIMESTAMP '2022-04-01'
      AND createddate::timestamp <  TIMESTAMP '2023-04-01'
      AND newvalue__c IS NOT NULL AND TRIM(newvalue__c) <> ''
    GROUP BY TRIM(BOTH '#' FROM newvalue__c)
  ) x
  GROUP BY agent_id
)
SELECT h.agent_id AS "Id"
FROM handled h
LEFT JOIN transfers t ON t.agent_id = h.agent_id
WHERE h.handled_cases > 0
ORDER BY COALESCE(t.transfer_count,0) ASC, h.handled_cases DESC, h.agent_id ASC
LIMIT 1;
